ZodErrors.invalid_type: The field has an invalid type or is required.
ZodErrors.invalid_string: The field has an invalid format.
ZodErrors.invalid_format: The field has an invalid format.
ZodErrors.invalid_date: The field contains an invalid date.
ZodErrors.invalid_value: The value for field is invalid.
ZodErrors.invalid_literal: The value for field does not match the expected value.
ZodErrors.invalid_union: The field does not match any of the allowed options.
ZodErrors.invalid_intersection_types: The field does not satisfy all combined constraints.
ZodErrors.invalid_enum_value: The value for field is not one of the allowed options.
ZodErrors.too_small: The field does not meet the minimum allowed value or length.
ZodErrors.too_big: The field exceeds the maximum allowed value or length.
ZodErrors.not_multiple_of: The field must be an allowed multiple.
ZodErrors.not_finite: The field must be a finite number.
ZodErrors.invalid_key: The field contains an invalid key.
ZodErrors.invalid_element: The field contains an invalid element.

errors.server: The request could not be completed. Please try again later.
errors.network: Could not connect to the server.
errors.validation: Check the highlighted fields and try again.

classrooms.title: Import classrooms
classrooms.description: Upload a CSV file with classrooms. Columns: name, capacity, floor, type.
classrooms.duplicate: The classroom {name} already exists. It will be skipped.

degrees.title: Import degrees
degrees.duplicateCode: The code {code} already exists. It will be skipped.
degrees.duplicateName: The degree {name} already exists. It will be skipped.

itineraries.title: Import itineraries
itineraries.description: Upload a CSV file with itineraries. Columns: degreeCode, code, name.
itineraries.missingDegree: The degree with code "{degreeCode}" does not exist in the organization.
itineraries.duplicate: The itinerary "{code}" already exists in degree {degreeCode}. It will be skipped.

subjects.title: Import subjects
subjects.description: CSV: degreeCode, name, code, availableShifts, courseYear, weeklyHours, numberOfStudents, period, isCommon, itineraryCode. In availableShifts, use a comma-separated list inside the same cell, for example "morning,afternoon".
subjects.missingItineraryCode: Since it is not common, you must provide the itineraryCode.
subjects.missingItinerary: The itinerary does not exist in this degree.
subjects.duplicate: Duplicate subject. It will be skipped.

subjectGroups.title: Import groups
subjectGroups.description: CSV: subjectCode, name, numberOfStudents, weeklyHours, groupType, shift, groupNumber
subjectGroups.duplicate: This group already exists for this subject. It will be skipped.

empty.title: No results
empty.description: There are no items to display right now.

Landing.title: Plan schedules with a clean, fast, and serious interface.
Landing.description: A modern foundation for managing organizations, classrooms, subjects, and users with JWT authentication and a consistent visual experience from end to end.
Landing.panelDescription: Continue along the path that best fits your current state.
Landing.panelNote: The login styling stays consistent across all authentication screens.

centralized.title: Centralized schedule
centralized.description: View and organize time slots, classrooms, and subjects in one place.

secure.title: Secure access
secure.description: JWT, role-based permissions, and a session flow ready to grow with the team.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.description: Built to coordinate organizations, members, and changes without friction.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Access your account to manage academic scheduling.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Create an account to start managing your schedules.

Profile.errorPassword: Could not update the password. Check your current password.

schedules.label: Schedules
schedules.title: Schedules in {organization}
schedules.description: Generate and manage interactive schedules massively or by segment with smart conflict resolution.
schedules.empty: No schedules have been generated for this organization yet.

errors.ERR_ROOM_CAPACITY: The selected classroom does not have enough capacity for this group.
errors.ERR_COMPUTER_LAB_REQUIRED: This group requires a computer lab.
errors.ERR_SHIFT_MORNING: This subject must be taught within the morning shift.
errors.ERR_SHIFT_AFTERNOON: This subject must be taught within the afternoon shift.
errors.ERR_SHIFT_EXCEEDS_DAY: The duration exceeds the maximum allowed hours in the day.
errors.ERR_OVERLAP_SINGLE_GROUP: This group is the only one available in its shift and cannot coincide with another.
errors.ERR_OVERLAP_DIFFERENT_GROUP_TYPES: Different group types cannot coincide at the same time.
errors.ERR_OVERLAP_SAME_SUBJECT: Two groups of the same subject cannot be taught at the same time.
errors.ERR_OVERLAP_DUPLICATE_GROUP: The same group appears more than once in this schedule.
errors.ERR_OVERLAP_COMMON_ITINERARY: Common subjects cannot overlap with itinerary subjects.
errors.ERR_ROOM_OVERLAP: The classroom is already occupied by another subject at this time.
errors.ERR_CLASSROOM_REQUIRED_FOR_PLACEMENT: A classroom must be assigned before choosing a day and time.
errors.ERR_SCHEDULE_HAS_CONFLICTS: Cannot publish a schedule with active conflicts.
errors.ERR_SCHEDULE_HAS_UNASSIGNED_SLOTS: Cannot publish a schedule with unassigned slots.
errors.ERR_UNASSIGNED_NO_ROOMS_OF_TYPE: No classrooms of the required type are available in the organization.
errors.ERR_UNASSIGNED_ROOM_CAPACITY: No classroom of the required type has enough capacity for this group ({capacity} students).
errors.ERR_UNASSIGNED_NO_COMPATIBLE_SLOTS: No compatible schedule positions remain because of shift or overlap constraints.
